---
title: Code Filename (Native)
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    syntax-highlighting: idiomatic
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - 'quarto-code-filename\('
        - []
---

```{.python filename="example.py"}
def hello():
    print("Hello, world!")
```
